idea-plugin.name: Vader
idea-plugin.description:
Syntax highlighting plus semantic-tokens LSP integration for the Vader programming language.
TextMate grammar is shared with the official VS Code extension. Semantic highlighting (richer VaderDoc tags, parameters, decorators) is delivered by the Vader Language Server, spawned via the vader lsp subcommand — requires an IDE that bundles the platform LSP module (IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate, RustRover, GoLand, …). On Community editions the plugin still loads and provides TextMate highlighting only.
